auth.signInSubtitle: A presentation-ready mental health companion for international students.
auth.name: Name
auth.legal: Clerk and Supabase are scaffolded. This build stays in safe mock mode until keys are added.

home.heroTitle: One place for cover, care, translation, and calm.
home.heroBody: Designed for fast demos: the flows are interactive, the risky parts stay mocked, and the UI stays crisp.
home.tipBody: Small routines beat heroic resets. Pick one action you can repeat after class and make it visible.

cards.financeBody: Compare plans, run the recommendation quiz, and view switch guides.
cards.doctorBody: Map nearby psychologists and Medicare-friendly clinics in one screen.
cards.translateBody: Use real text translation now and demo voice translation in premium mode.
cards.membershipBody: Unlock OSHC recommendations and voice translation with one upgrade flow.

finance.title: OSHC support
finance.subtitle: Presentation-first comparisons, quiz ranking, and switching guidance.
finance.browseBody: Pick two or three plans and scan the difference in seconds.
finance.quizBody: Answer four lightweight questions and get a ranked shortlist.
finance.guideBody: Call, confirm, and switch with a clean checklist.
finance.compareHelper: Select up to three plans for the compare matrix.

planPerks.lowCost: Lower entry price for tight student budgets.
planPerks.easyClaims: Simple claims flow for quick reimbursements.
planPerks.mentalHealthFocus: Stronger fit when counselling cover matters.
planPerks.extrasBundle: Best fit when you want dental and optical extras.
planPerks.familyFriendly: More comfortable for partner or family needs.
planPerks.goodValue: Solid middle ground between cost and flexibility.

quiz.startBody: Quick rules-based scoring. No AI hand-waving.
quiz.resultBody: Your strongest match is ranked first, with backup options below.

household.title: Who needs cover?
household.description: This changes how much family flexibility matters.

budget.title: What matters more?
budget.description: Choose between price discipline and broader cover.

extras.title: Do extras matter?
extras.description: Think dental, optical, and add-on support.

mentalHealth.title: How important is mental health cover?
mentalHealth.description: Use this to bias plans that feel stronger for counselling support.

guideChecklist.one: Confirm the minimum policy end date on your current cover.
guideChecklist.two: Call the provider and ask for the exact cancellation path for student policies.
guideChecklist.three: Submit the new policy first, then request overlap confirmation.
guideChecklist.four: Keep screenshots of cover letters for visa or university admin follow-up.

doctor.title: Find care nearby
doctor.subtitle: Static demo data, parallel fetch flow, and practical filters.
doctor.locationFallback: Location access skipped. Falling back to Melbourne CBD.
doctor.mapFallback: Map preview stays simplified on web. Native builds can switch to interactive markers.
doctor.bookSubtitle: Choose a slot and show a clear confirmation state.
doctor.noteLabel: What would you like to mention?
doctor.bookingBody: This is a presentation-safe mock. No real clinic request was sent.

translate.title: Translate with less friction
translate.subtitle: Text mode is functional. Voice mode is staged for demos.
translate.voiceSubtitle: A timed script simulates recognition and translation in premium mode.
translate.inputPlaceholder: Type what you want to say in your own language.

errors.browserNotSupported: DeepL quick mode only works in the native app. Use Expo Go on your phone, or add a backend proxy for web.
errors.notConfigured: Translation is not configured yet. Add EXPO_PUBLIC_DEEPL_API_KEY or connect a secure translate-text proxy.
errors.requestFailed: Translation failed. Check the DeepL API key or network request.

membership.title: Membership and credits
membership.subtitle: Simple pricing, visible value, and a mock Stripe top-up path.
membership.topupBody: In this MVP, payment success is mocked but the state update is real.
membership.referralBody: Share your code. The demo can simulate a successful referral reward instantly.
membership.lockedBody: This flow stays behind the premium gate so the demo clearly shows membership value.
membership.packSuccess: Credits added and premium unlocked for the demo.

profile.title: Profile and settings
profile.connectedHint: Clerk and Supabase keys are optional right now. The app remains usable without them.

notFound.title: This screen is missing
notFound.body: The route is not wired yet. Head back to the main flow.
